case_title: WILLIAM CHIN VS. CHI HUNG LEUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHIN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHI HUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-05-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHI HUNG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM CHIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHI HUNG LEUNG IS PRESENT ASSISTED WITH CANTONESE INTERPRESTATION BY CHARLES CHANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEUNG, CHI HUNG THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH BY-LAWS OF THE HEE SHEN ASSOCIATION WHEN THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF THE HEE SHEN ASSOCIATION EXPELLED PLAINTIFF'S MEMBERSHIP IN THE ASSOCIATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
